constraints.expression: consumer interprets model_call_circuit_breaker_state per their dispatch policy: 'healthy' → unrestricted; 'degraded' → reduced-rate / fallback; 'open' → stop dispatch + drain in-flight
constraints.message: Circuit-breaker state surfaces dispatch policy guidance; consumer applies the policy.
constraints.evaluation_note: Policy mapping is consumer-side per ADR-010. The schema enumerates the three legal states ('healthy', 'degraded', 'open') at the structural layer; the dispatch action attached to each state is the consumer's responsibility. Runtime-deferred classification keeps the rule visible in the UnverifiedObligationsManifest so a consumer not subscribing to the circuit-breaker channel still sees the obligation.
